matrix.time_impact: High (Requires hours of Architect time per PR/Release)
matrix.scalability: Extremely Low (Architects become a strict bottleneck)
matrix.violation_risk: Medium-High (Rules are easily forgotten or ignored)
matrix.best_for: Small monolithic projects or early startups without defined architectures.

matrix.scalability: Medium (Covers the basics, but nuanced rules still require humans)
matrix.violation_risk: Low (Protects the system from catastrophic coupling)
matrix.best_for: Transitioning mid-sized enterprises moving towards microservices.

matrix.coverage: 95%+ (Checks layers, dependencies, modularity on every commit)
matrix.time_impact: Low in daily dev, High initial setup cost
matrix.violation_risk: Very Low (The architecture is strictly self-enforcing)
matrix.tech_debt_impact: Very High Positive (Keeps Drift Rate near 0%)
matrix.best_for: Mature Enterprise ecosystems, heavy compliance environments, massive microservice fleets.
